⚙️  SYSTEM STATUS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✅ Monitor Script: Operational
✅ JSONL Logger: Operational (33 comments logged)
✅ State Tracking: Current
✅ Auto-Response Engine: Operational
✅ Spam Filter: Operational
✅ Sales Flagging: Operational
✅ Cron Schedule: Running every 30 minutes
⏳ API Mode: Demo/Simulation (no live YouTube API auth)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📝 LOGGING & PERSISTENCE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Log File: .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl
Format: JSONL (one JSON object per line)
Current Size: ~35 KB
Record Count: 33+ entries
Retention: Cumulative (no rotation)

Each log entry contains:
  • timestamp (UTC)
  • comment_id
  • commenter (author name)
  • text (full comment)
  • category (questions|praise|sales|spam|other)
  • response_status (auto_responded|flagged_for_review|processed)
  • template_response (if applicable)
  • run_time

Query example (recent questions):
  jq 'select(.category=="questions")' .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔧 NEXT STEPS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

TO GO LIVE:
  1. Create YouTube Data API v3 credentials at: https://console.cloud.google.com
  2. Download OAuth 2.0 credentials (Desktop app)
  3. Save to: ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube_credentials.json
  4. Run: python3 .cache/youtube-comment-monitor-complete.py --live
  5. Complete OAuth flow (opens browser for authorization)

System will auto-detect credentials and switch to live mode.

MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED:
  ➜ Jessica Parker partnership inquiry (see comment #6)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Next Scheduled Run: April 19, 2026 — 8:00 PM (PDT) / April 20, 03:00 UTC
